en.name: Bullpen
en.desc: Sudoku meets Minesweeper! Use number clues to deduce which cells contain bulls. A unique logic puzzle combining two classic games into one.
en.howToPlay: Each row, column, and region must contain a specific number of bulls. Numbers show how many bulls are in adjacent cells. Use logic to deduce safe cells from mine-like clues.
tips: Start with regions that have the most constraints
Use the number clues like Minesweeper to find patterns
Remember: you're placing bulls, not avoiding them
Cross-reference Sudoku rules with adjacency clues

zh.name: 牛栏逻辑
zh.desc: 数独遇上扫雷！利用数字提示推断哪些格子包含公牛。独特的逻辑谜题，将两款经典游戏合二为一。
zh.howToPlay: 点击和拖动创建矩形墙。每个数字区域必须被划分为恰好该数量的矩形。每个矩形恰好包含一个数字。矩形不能包含两个或更多数字。
tips: 从约束最多的区域开始（大数字）
每个矩形必须恰好包含一个数字
矩形不能重叠或穿过区域边界
使用排除法找到可能的矩形
